cat > /tmp/update-subscription-stripe-prices.sql <<'SQL'
UPDATE subscription_plans
SET stripe_price_id = 'price_1TLzYkKxyMynMg1MK4AR45ym'
WHERE id = 'ab5f5f03-001b-4834-8c5c-abc715d98a4d';

UPDATE subscription_plans
SET stripe_price_id = 'price_1TLzYlKxyMynMg1MA8CQZv8z'
WHERE id = '1d1d59ef-6805-4041-9c8b-e43d1481ff0b';

SELECT id, name, price_monthly, stripe_price_id, is_active
FROM subscription_plans
ORDER BY price_monthly ASC, created_at ASC;
SQL
export PGPASSWORD='gTuUC2s8C2kDwMxKqLzAu8F3'
psql -h database-1.cpgqmsiso90v.ap-northeast-1.rds.amazonaws.com -U postgres -d postgres -f /tmp/update-subscription-stripe-prices.sql
